description_long: This is a large, modern cargo or transport airplane with a robust, angular fuselage and a high-mounted, straight wing configuration. The aircraft features four prominent jet engines mounted in pairs under each wing, with large circular intakes and exhausts. The tail section is equipped with a T-tail design, where the horizontal stabilizer sits atop a tall vertical fin, and the rear fuselage is squared off, suggesting a cargo ramp or door. The cockpit is positioned at the very front of the fuselage, with a multi-panel windshield and a visible access ladder beneath the left side. The landing gear appears to be a tricycle configuration, with the main gear housed in pods under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The exterior is primarily light gray with dark accents around the engines and windows, giving it a utilitarian, military or heavy-duty civilian transport appearance.
description: A large, high-wing cargo or transport airplane with four underwing jet engines, a T-tail, and a forward cockpit. The exterior is light gray with dark engine and window accents.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the T-tail, squared-off fuselage, and four large jet engines under the wings.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the high-mounted wings, engine placement, cockpit windows, and access ladder.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the cockpit, nose, four jet engines, and the broad wingspan.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the wing, engines, cockpit, and access ladder.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: High-wing, straight configuration with no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four underwing jet engines, likely turbofan type.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main gear units under the wings and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multi-panel windows, likely multi-seat.
